name: 圣光惩击
description: 消耗2AP，对敌方生命值最低的棋子造成5点真实伤害
code: function executeCard(context) { const battle = context.battle; const playerId = context.playerId; const player = battle.players.find(function(p) { return p.playerId === playerId; }); if (!player) { return { success: false, message: '找不到玩家' }; } const sourcePiece = battle.pieces.find(function(p) { return p.ownerPlayerId === playerId && p.currentHp > 0; }); if (!sourcePiece) { return { success: false, message: '没有可用的来源棋子' }; } const enemies = battle.pieces.filter(function(p) { return p.ownerPlayerId !== playerId && p.currentHp > 0; }); if (enemies.length === 0) { return { success: false, message: '没有敌人' }; } const target = enemies.sort(function(a, b) { return a.currentHp - b.currentHp; })[0]; let damage = 5; let buffMsg = ''; if (player.buffs && player.buffs['elune-blessing-buff'] && player.buffs['elune-blessing-buff'].uses > 0) { damage = Math.floor(damage * player.buffs['elune-blessing-buff'].multiplier); player.buffs['elune-blessing-buff'].uses--; buffMsg = '（月神赐福强化）'; } const result = dealDamage(sourcePiece, target, damage, 'true', battle, 'holy-smite'); return { success: true, message: '圣光惩击' + buffMsg + '对' + target.name + '造成' + result.damage + '点真实伤害' }; }
